storyInfo: In face of the 'waterfall' of Oka, Mon3tr discovers its true nature. The Doctor realizes that Priestess is offering an invitation to continue the debate. Deep in the mines, a mutated manglerbeast roars.

attributes.content: Ahead is the tunnel where we first found Oka.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: It should have been placed under lockdown soon after... but now, it looks completely abandoned.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The good news is that Originium particle activity has also dropped after work stopped. Infection risk should be minimal as long as you do not touch the deactivated Originium crystals.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I'm not detecting any other lifeforms. We should be able to get in without a fight.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: We still don't know what happened here.;The Patrol Units and guards could return any time.
Time is of the essence.;Let's do this quickly.

attributes.content: Are you sure this is the right way, Ksenia?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I don't see anything.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Sorry. I've only been down here once before...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Let me find the emergency power switch.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Here it is.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Ok, looks like this is the right way. All we need to do is to go in the opposite direction from the mine carts.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Opposite direction? I thought we're going deeper.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It leads to somewhere other than the mine tunnels. I don't know what it's actually for, but the carts only carry goods, not people.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: What about the cart? Can we use it?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: There are no structural issues, but it's been abandoned for so long that there's only enough emergency power for the lights. I don't think it's a good idea.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Mm.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: You two, get on the cart.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: There's no safety belt!;We can walk!

attributes.content: Get on, Doctor. We can save time that way.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: But it won't start—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I'll take care of it.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Do you need me to lift you up, Doctor?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Are you ready?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: What are you planning—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: —Whoa?!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: We'll be thrown off the cart.;The cart's going to fall apart.

attributes.content: It'll be fine. Just sit tight.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Here we go!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Thank goodness the tunnels look intact.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But we should have started a fire before coming down... it's a lot wetter than the outside. The difference is almost as great as the Iberian coast compared to inland Ursus.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Of course, there is a dramatic difference in temperature as well... are you alright?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I'm fine. What about you, Doctor?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: Every part of my brain feels equally shaken.;You looked like you enjoyed it, Mon3tr.

attributes.content: I kept the speed steady.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Mon3tr is a very good cart driver. Or cart pusher.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Sounds like the problem's not on my end.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: I have a question, Ksenia.;When was Oka first discovered in the mines?

attributes.content: I'm not sure exactly when. The first sample arrived at the lab a month ago.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: That was when I learned of the appearance of this heretofore unheard-of substance in the Originium mines.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: This substance that appeared in the mines...;What made the lab decide to perform human experiments?

attributes.content: Infected exposed to Oka in this tunnel were subject to unusual mutations.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Their infection readings soared, but their vital signs remained stable, 'healthy' even...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: That sounds familiar.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Have you encountered other patients like this? Have they come into contact with Oka?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: There may be another possibility.;We're not sure yet...

attributes.content: In any case... the Ursine government wanted to replicate the 'miracle'.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I suppose they wanted a docile labor force that did not fear illness or pain... perhaps even employ them in combat.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: I'm not surprised the government would react that way...;They haven't realized the potential danger.

attributes.content: I think we're getting close.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: This is as far as the rail goes. We'll have to proceed on foot.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The three of you move forward in the darkness.
You hear before you see. It is the heavy sound of water.
The three of you look up and slowly open your eyes.
You soon realize that the light in the tunnel is not coming from outside. It is coming from the stationary liquid in front of you on the ground—and the 'waterfall' at the very end.
It glitters like obsidian, refracting light from a crack high above as it falls, making the cave bright as early morning after a shower.
You can tell?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Yes. Like an obsequent river, the Oka cannot flow outwards along the dip, so it can only flow backwards, until it lies 'still' like this.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: But it continues to flow in a way, even without external forces acting on it. That's why they named it 'Oka'—river.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The liquid is everywhere.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It's like a natural karst cave. You can't even tell that it used to be a mine.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Even stranger, Oka itself is almost like water.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: What do you mean?;How could it be?

attributes.content: Well... in a manner of speaking.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Oka becomes highly stable after it is allowed to stand still for a while. It can even be used as a universal solvent.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Wait! We still shouldn't touch it with bare hands—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Oh...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Mon3tr bends over and collects some liquid with a test tube. She is not wearing gloves, or any other form of protection.
Her expression grows solemn as she shakes the liquid in the test tube with wet hands.
You should not touch it directly—I have protective equipment. You can tell me if you want a sample, and I'll collect it!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: (Whisper) Doctor... I know what this is.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.options: Ksenia, the samples...;Can you get some samples from around the waterfall?

attributes.content: Oh, okay.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Wait here. I'll be back soon.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: ...Be careful.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: This liquid that they call Oka... it's Originium.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: Originium...;Why does it look that way?

attributes.content: It's complicated.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Do you remember the 'Transmitter' that Rhine Lab was studying, or the 'Corazonix' that is often mentioned in Iberian alchemy?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: This is their prototype... or perhaps I should say, the original form.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: What the Transmitter and Corazonix have in common...;They both serve as a kind of medium.

attributes.content: Yes. A medium that reacts directly with the human body, or to store information.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: So that's why they are both liquid?

attributes.content: I think so...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: You understand, Doctor, that Originium is both a vehicle for information, and a vehicle for energy.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Both the Transmitter and Corazonix re-record Originium energy through specific means, in order to record different types of information.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The Oka here is the remnant of Originium, after its energy was extracted in an even more effective manner.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: So it's really a form of 'universal solvent', and this explains why the Infected who came into contact with Oka became 'mutated'.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Because of its nature as drained Originium, Oka neutralizes the Originium activity inside the Infected, while creating the perfect conditions for the continued growth of Originium.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It allowed the Infected to retain their vital functions temporarily, but does not change the fact that death would inevitably follow soon.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Meanwhile, all the uninfected individuals injected with Oka died of severe rejection, due to the lack of active Originium in their bodies...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: Its presence here in such quantities...;It means...

attributes.content: This is what we feared the most...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The Kolossal Prime Vein is drying up.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The rumors we heard, that Ursus is accelerating the extraction of Originium... it's all to hide the exhaustion of the ore vein.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: It began here in the northmost parts of Ursus, and it will only accelerate.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Within four months, the Originium deposits in Ursus will drop to thirty percent of previous levels.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: This is the real reason why the Grand Duchess put the mining district on lockdown.;They can't hide it forever.

attributes.content: You did not need to ask the question. One gaze exchanged with Mon3tr, and both of you have the same name in mind.
The only one who could have done this—
There's no one else.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The exhaustion of the ore vein cannot be stopped or reversed.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Ursus will collapse.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: Exhaustion on such a scale will have ramifications across Terra.

attributes.content: I have an idea!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Oka is also a relic of the old civilization... a by-product of your experiments.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: If she caused the exhaustion of the ore vein, then there might be some useful information left within.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: See if you can read it.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Our means are limited. You'll have to insert your hand, like I did when I collected the sample.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Don't worry, it won't harm you.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Following Mon3tr's instructions, you crouch down and immerse your hands into the liquid Oka.
You wait.

attributes.options: You do not feel any different.

attributes.content: You await some kind of change, or response, like the 'miracles' that happened so many times before.
Nothing happened.
The product of a previous civilization seems to reject you, denying your connection to it.

attributes.options: Could it be that it has already lost its ability to hold information?;Or perhaps, she had no intention of leaving any information to us.

attributes.content: It's possible.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Mon3tr! Doctor!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Come! I found something!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: There's a hole behind the waterfall. When I climbed up and stood there—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I heard a sound of an unusual frequency from the cave. It didn't seem natural—no, it definitely isn't natural!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: It's like... it's trying to communicate some sort of information through audio waves!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: This is—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: This space was hidden behind the waterfall?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Listen carefully to the sound of the liquid impacting the rocks! Some of the sounds are of a particular frequency, like it's trying to draw attention to itself. It's very different, and you can definitely tell.
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I tried to decipher the ones I heard. It took a while to record the various pitches—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: There! Did you hear that?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: All I hear is the rain! I can't even hear you speak—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Doctor?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: You close your eyes and allow yourself to be immersed in sound.
Until you identify the sound that is constantly changing in frequency.
—Did you say you hear it—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The sound rushes into your consciousness. Sometimes it is formed from several high frequencies, sometimes it is short and sharp, like a meticulous music score.
You soon realize that it represents some sort of code, or perhaps language.
You try to recall all the languages that you know, categorizing them in your mind, and you soon realize that you are hearing the same word, just in different languages.
I've copied it down...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: It's just a hunch, but if we decipher it using the standard encoding for communication between nomadic cities...
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: I think it's referring to the same word, in many different languages. I could identify Ursine and Gaulish from it! I think they both mean—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Upon the rocks, the liquid in the mine is communicating the same word at you—
Yes, Dr. {@nickname}.
If you still believe you made the right choice.
If you still believe in the future you described.
Then refute me with reality, and prove to me...
That thing which you hold so firm...
What?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: (Whisper) You think it's a message from Priestess?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We'll go back to the lab once Ksenia has gathered her samples.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We must try to contact Amiya...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: I wonder how Amiya's team is doing.;I hope Amiya has made contact with Raidian.

attributes.content: What sound?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: The waterfall is pretty loud.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Are you sure it's not just your ears ringing? Perhaps lingering effects from having to process too much information just now...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Wait.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Ksenia? Is that you?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: It's not Ksenia's footsteps. Not the right weight or rhythm.

attributes.content: What's... that—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Frenzied crying, frenetic breathing, thick mucous liquid dripping from the fangs.
Its entire body is covered in a hard layer of dark-red Originium, forcing it to stand on its two hind legs.
You see it raise its front paws—
Not paws. A pair of withered hands, indistinguishable from that of a human.
I have the samples!
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: Why are you just standing there?
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The strange manglerbeast, which seems so removed from reality, is right behind her.
Run, Ksenia! Don't look back!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I'll get her. Go to the mine cart, Doctor, and we'll meet you there!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Go!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: What—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: The researcher cannot help but look back as she starts running.
She hardly has the time to swallow her scream.
Gosudar-batyushka—
attributes.name: Ksenia

attributes.content: What is that thing?!
attributes.name: Ksenia
